name: Darkheart
description:
Art by soda herself (if asked why the pfp changed i got asked to change it by the artist.)

This was a request by... lemme check my notes... @confused?iwasconfusedonce.theywouldntshutupaboutru! i hope you enjoy pookie!!!!!!! <3

As ive mentioned i do also do requests, and would love to do them for any of yall. give me a character and scenario or just a character and ill try my best!

If yall guys want i will of course redo some characters for yall i wont ever mind doing anything like that. Just ask away and ill do it, from phighting characters to the deities. ill do whatever!

Anyways EAT UP POOKIES!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Love you all! <3
creator: Hexxtheproto
